title: Nathan McAvoy
description: England international rugby league & union footballer
extract: Nathaniel Joseph McAvoy (born 31 December 1976) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played as a centre or wing. He spent most of his club career with Salford (1994–98 and 2004–05) and Bradford Bulls (1998–2002 and 2007), but also had short spells with Leeds Rhinos, Wigan Warriors and Leigh Centurions. At international level, he was capped four times for England between 1996 and 1999. He also played rugby union for Saracens in 2003–04. As of 2011, he is a qualified PE teacher and teaches in Manchester.
